channel.title: Facing issue in Deploy Frontity using Vercel
channel.description:
Hello Friends,
I need your help for vercel implement.
i have also check but did'n get any reference link or video for specific frontity framework .
i am facing domain related issue so that how can i setup .
this link provide only basic information and we are using proxy for the frontity so how we can point domain on it . == > https://docs.frontity.org/deployment/deploy-using-vercel#vercel-and-https.
Thanks.

item.title: Facing issue in Deploy Frontity using Vercel
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
HI @bhagvan.vrinsofts,

Can you provide more details about your implementation?
Which errors are you getting? which type of proxy are you using? What are your proxy settings?

Can you also please provide a repo or code-sandbox with your code? This is especially helpful to find solutions to technical issues with specific code

Detailing the info suggested here when having issues will help the community to provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible.

Read full topic
item.source: Facing issue in Deploy Frontity using Vercel

item.title: Facing issue in Deploy Frontity using Vercel
item.dc:creator: bhagvan.vrinsofts
item.description:
Hello Friends,

I need your help for vercel implement.

i have also check but did’n get any reference link or video for specific frontity framework .

i am facing domain related issue so that how can i setup .

this link provide only basic information and we are using proxy for the frontity so how we can point domain on it .
== > Deploy Frontity using Vercel - Frontity Docs.

Thanks.

Read full topic
